channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Team Trump Wants 'Neutral' Oman To 'Pick A Side' That's Not Iran

media:content.media:description: Oman seems to be losing its footing as a neutral party.

item.description: The Trump administration's distrust of Muscat reportedly started a day before the first US-Israeli airstrikes when Oman's foreign minister claimed an agreement between Washington and Tehran on nuclear issues was "within our reach".
item.content:encoded: The Trump administration's distrust of Muscat reportedly started a day before the first US-Israeli airstrikes when Oman's foreign minister claimed an agreement between Washington and Tehran on nuclear issues was "within our reach".

item.title: US-Iran War Live Updates: Iranian Officer Says Renewed War With US 'Inevitable' Amid Trump's Peace Push
item.description: US-Iran war live updates: The remark by Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf came as reports suggested US President Donald Trump has sent back a revised, tougher peace proposal
item.content:encoded: US-Iran war live updates: The remark by Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf came as reports suggested US President Donald Trump has sent back a revised, tougher peace proposal

item.title: MAGA Divided Over AI As Trump Pushes For Rapid Expansion

media:content.media:description: But Trump's fervent support for AI so far has been enough to alienate his most enthusiastic backers.

item.description: President Donald Trump is an enthusiastic advocate for swift AI development in America, dismissing regulation as a curb...
item.content:encoded: President Donald Trump is an enthusiastic advocate for swift AI development in America, dismissing regulation as a curb...

item.title: 80% Chance Of El Nino Developing Between June And August: Global Weather Office

media:content.media:description: It typically takes place every two to seven years and lasts around nine to 12 months.

item.description: There is an 80-percent chance of the warming El Nino phenomenon developing between June and August, increasing the risk of extreme weather events, the...
item.content:encoded: There is an 80-percent chance of the warming El Nino phenomenon developing between June and August, increasing the risk of extreme weather events, the...

item.title: Nvidia's Big H-1B Push Is Silver Lining For Indian Techies In US

media:content.media:description: Nvidia Chief Executive Officer Jensen Huang is himself an immigrant born in Taiwan.

item.description: Nvidia Jobs: Nvidia has secured certification for around 1,200 H-1B positions during the first two quarters of fiscal 2026.
item.content:encoded: Nvidia Jobs: Nvidia has secured certification for around 1,200 H-1B positions during the first two quarters of fiscal 2026.

item.title: Women, Black Officers Among 9 Dropped From US Navy Promotion List: Report

media:content.media:description: Four current and former defence officials said Hegseth's actions appear to violate rules (File)

item.description: Hegseth removed at least three women, two Black men and four white men from the promotion list.
item.content:encoded: Hegseth removed at least three women, two Black men and four white men from the promotion list.

item.title: Zelensky Pushes For AI And Drone Collaboration With American Defence Startups
item.description: Zelenskyy noted that American technology firms possess AI innovations, while Ukraine has gained knowledge from years of combat operations.
item.content:encoded: Zelenskyy noted that American technology firms possess AI innovations, while Ukraine has gained knowledge from years of combat operations.

item.title: How UK, France Teamed Up To Stop Russian 'Shadow Fleet' In Atlantic

media:content.media:description: The Kremlin strongly objected to the seizure.

item.description: British and French forces worked together to track and board a tanker accused of helping Russia bypass sanctions
item.content:encoded: British and French forces worked together to track and board a tanker accused of helping Russia bypass sanctions

item.title: Trump Wants Tougher Iran Deal, But It Looks More Like Obama's 2015 Pact

media:content.media:description: Trump is focused on making a new Iran deal. (file)

item.description: It seems that the draft memorandum of understanding (MoU), which is being discussed with Iran, is, in some ways, similar to the deal he had strongly opposed.
item.content:encoded: It seems that the draft memorandum of understanding (MoU), which is being discussed with Iran, is, in some ways, similar to the deal he had strongly opposed.

item.title: Russian Strikes Rock Ukraine, Killing 9, Wounding Dozens

media:content.media:description: Deadly strikes, involving both missiles and drones, were also reported elsewhere.

item.description: Moscow has bombarded Ukraine almost daily since launching an offensive in 2022, often provoking retaliation from Kyiv, as talks to end Europe's deadliest conflict since World War II remain stalled.
item.content:encoded: Moscow has bombarded Ukraine almost daily since launching an offensive in 2022, often provoking retaliation from Kyiv, as talks to end Europe's deadliest conflict since World War II remain stalled.

item.title: Trump's $1.8 Billion 'Weaponization' Payout Put On Hold After Backlash

media:content.media:description: The Republican rebellion was an extraordinary act of defiance given Trump's insistence on loyalty

item.description: The proposal was dropped as senators returned to Washington after their Memorial Day break and faced an impasse with the president over a $72 billion bill to fund ICE and Border Patrol operations.
item.content:encoded: The proposal was dropped as senators returned to Washington after their Memorial Day break and faced an impasse with the president over a $72 billion bill to fund ICE and Border Patrol operations.

item.title: "You're F***ing Crazy, Everybody Hates You Now": Trump-Netanyahu Heated Call

media:content.media:description: Trump also reportedly put the brakes on Israel's plan to strike Beirut.

item.description: US-Iran War Latest News: "You're F***ing Crazy, Would Be In Prison If It Weren't For Me": Trump Lashes Out At Netanyahu Over Lebanon
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1107347/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>US-Iran War Latest News: "You're F***ing Crazy, Would Be In Prison If It Weren't For Me": Trump Lashes Out At Netanyahu Over Lebanon

item.title: Man Named Loony Toon, Who Shot At Police Officers, Sentenced To 20 Years In Prison

media:content.media:description: Toon convicted of multiple attempted murder counts receives 20-year prison sentence in Oregon.

item.description: Loony John Franklin Kolb Toon gets 20 years for shooting at police during June 2025 traffic stop.
item.content:encoded: Loony John Franklin Kolb Toon gets 20 years for shooting at police during June 2025 traffic stop.

item.title: US Cuts Agricultural Equipment Tariffs From 25% To 15% Amid Rising Farm Costs

media:content.media:description: Tariffs on agricultural equipment cut to 15% with possible 10% for US steel content, effective June 8.

item.description: Tariffs on agricultural equipment cut to 15% with possible 10% for US steel content, effective June 8.
item.content:encoded: Tariffs on agricultural equipment cut to 15% with possible 10% for US steel content, effective June 8.

item.title: 7, Including Suspect, Killed In Shooting After "Domestic Dispute" In US' Iowa

media:content.media:description: Investigators soon identified the suspected shooter as Ryan Willis McFarland

item.description: 5, Including Suspect, Killed In Shooting After A "Domestic Dispute" In US' Iowa
item.content:encoded: 5, Including Suspect, Killed In Shooting After A "Domestic Dispute" In US' Iowa

item.title: New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani Signs 'Cutest' Executive Order Ahead Of NBA Finals: 'No More Bedtimes'

media:content.media:description: Zohran Mamdani signs an order repealing bedtimes during the Knicks' NBA Finals run.

item.description: New York City (NYC) Mayor Zohran Mamdani suspends bedtimes so kids can watch the Knicks in the NBA Finals.
item.content:encoded: New York City (NYC) Mayor Zohran Mamdani suspends bedtimes so kids can watch the Knicks in the NBA Finals.

item.title: Won't Allow Our Territory To Be Used Against India: Myanmar President

media:content.media:description: The President extended a formal invitation to PM Modi to visit Myanmar

item.description: India and Myanmar on Monday pledged to deepen bilateral cooperation across security, trade and infrastructure as Prime Minister Narendra Modi held talks with Myanmar President U Min Aung Hlaing in New Delhi
item.content:encoded: India and Myanmar on Monday pledged to deepen bilateral cooperation across security, trade and infrastructure as Prime Minister Narendra Modi held talks with Myanmar President U Min Aung Hlaing in New Delhi

item.title: Trump's "Eternity" Hope For Israel And Iran-Backed Hezbollah

media:content.media:description: Trump said on his Truth Social network that Hezbollah had "agreed to stop shooting at Israel.

item.description: Trump said on his Truth Social network that Hezbollah had "agreed to stop shooting at Israel, and its soldiers. Likewise, Israel agreed to stop shooting at them. Let's see how long that lasts -- Hopefully it will be for ETERNITY!"
item.content:encoded: Trump said on his Truth Social network that Hezbollah had "agreed to stop shooting at Israel, and its soldiers. Likewise, Israel agreed to stop shooting at them. Let's see how long that lasts -- Hopefully it will be for ETERNITY!"

item.title: Pentagon Bars Journalists From Its Press Office. Here's Why

media:content.media:description: The Department has declared that its press office is now a classified space inaccessible to journalists.

item.description: On X, acting Pentagon press secretary Joel Valdez confirmed the move, saying there was "nothing controversial" about it and that it came because speechwriters, who use classified material, were now occupying the space.
item.content:encoded: On X, acting Pentagon press secretary Joel Valdez confirmed the move, saying there was "nothing controversial" about it and that it came because speechwriters, who use classified material, were now occupying the space.

item.title: 6.1 Magnitude Earthquake Hits Italy
item.description: A 6.1 magnitude earthquake struck off the coast of southern Italy in the early hours of Tuesday, the German Research Centre for Geosciences said. The quake was registered at a depth
item.content:encoded: A 6.1 magnitude earthquake struck off the coast of southern Italy in the early hours of Tuesday, the German Research Centre for Geosciences said. The quake was registered at a depth
